headlines: AI-driven datacenter builds drive Microsoft's emissions up a quarter in one year
EU puts 'addictive' design of Facebook, Instagram under the DSA microscope
Capita hears demand for pension scheme cleanup 'loud and clear' – but won't say yes

crew_quote: "Great! We're stuck in a datacenter with no power and no weather, but at least Facebook's addictive — just like that curry I had last night!"
